attempt_failure_expiry_ms.description: webhooks attempt failure expiry in milliseconds

default.CHANNEL_ANSWER: This webhook is triggered when a channel establishes two-way audio, such as a voicemail box or the called party answering
default.CHANNEL_BRIDGE: This webhook is triggered when two channels are bridged together, such as two users/devices connected together
default.CHANNEL_CREATE: This webhook is triggered when a new channel is created
default.CHANNEL_DESTROY: This webhook is triggered when a channel is destroyed, usually as a result of a hangup
default.CHANNEL_HOLD: This webhook is triggered when an established call gets put on hold
default.CHANNEL_UNHOLD: This webhook is triggered when an established call gets taken off hold

disable_disabler.description: if true webhooks will not be automatically disabled

mms_number_format_regex.description: mms regex format for isolating capture group and stripping +1

sms_number_format_regex.description: sms regex format for isolating capture group and stripping +1
